# Imagen

## Overview
Image generation using Google's Imagen model. Creates high-quality photorealistic images from detailed text descriptions.

## Style Capabilities
- Photorealistic images
- Digital art and illustration
- 3D renders
- Product shots
- Landscape and architectural visualization

## Best Practices
- Be specific about lighting, composition, and style
- Reference real photographic terms (35mm, f/2.8, shallow DOF)
- Use negative prompts to exclude unwanted elements
- Specify aspect ratio (1:1, 16:9, 4:3, 9:16)
